en_title: If You've Ever Wanted to Control Disneyland's Haunted Mansion, then Scream Operator: Haunted House Manager Is the Game For You
cn_title: 《惊声操作员：鬼屋经理》公布，2027年登陆PC
subtitle: 在控制室经营鬼屋
opus_summary: 像素风经营模拟游戏《惊声操作员：鬼屋经理》将于2027年第一季度登陆PC，玩家需要在控制室调度设施、布置道具并维持鬼屋运作；试玩版计划于今年万圣节推出。

paragraphs.en: If you've ever wanted to operate Disneyland's classic Haunted Mansion ride, this game's for you. Introducing Scream Operator: Haunted House Manager, a game that, as the name suggests, lets you operate, manage, upgrade, and maintain a successful haunted house — all from the control booth of the ride.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你曾想亲自操控迪士尼乐园经典的「幽灵公馆」游乐设施，那么《惊声操作员：鬼屋经理》或许正适合你。正如名称所示，这款游戏让你在设施控制室内运营、管理、升级并维护一座成功的鬼屋。

paragraphs.en: Scream Operator is being developed by Japhet Interactive for PC, and it's due out in Q1 2027. It's a 2D, pixel-art, top-down management sim where you'll operate your haunted house from the control booth — triggering pre-shows, dispatching ride vehicles, placing props and animatronics, sorting merchandise, upgrading your tech, paying the bills, and just surviving your shift. Oh, and of course the big goal: scare your guests!
paragraphs.cn: 《惊声操作员》由Japhet Interactive开发，计划于2027年第一季度登陆PC。这是一款2D像素风俯视角经营模拟游戏：你要在控制室触发开场秀、调度乘坐设施、布置道具和机械人偶、整理商品、升级技术、支付账单，并设法熬过每个班次。当然，最重要的目标还是吓到游客。

paragraphs.en: A playable demo is planned for Halloween this year. In the meantime, you can wishlist Scream Operator if you're interested.
paragraphs.cn: 本作计划在今年万圣节推出可试玩Demo；感兴趣的玩家目前可以加入愿望单。
